content_body: Thank you for sharing your beautiful yet homey cabin with us! This was our second trip to Blue Ridge GA and this cabin was the perfect spot for our family of 4 to get a taste of fall, which included our 10-year-old daughter and 6-year-old son. The views, the local hiking at Fall Branch Falls, Aska Trails, and Long Creek Falls, along with horseback riding at Blanche Manor and Downtown Blue Ridge made for the perfect vacation. Add in the pool table and the comfortable couhces, and it is heaven on earth! A memorable vacation that will be repeated!  Thank you from South Florida
title: Fall in Blue Ridge, GA
